posts.author: bryce-thewell (Bryce K)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

We use both Monday Task Management and CRM products. I have Monday.com to automatically open on startup (Chrome), but it always defaults to the CRM. I want it to default to the Task Management. Ideally it would go directly to the My Work section, but that URL is the same for both products so it’s always random which product it decides to load. Is there a way to have it always go to the Task Management “My Work” instead of the CRM “My Work”? Or should I have it open a specific board that would only be within Task Management?

What are you trying to achieve

Go to specific Monday.com product on browser startup.

posts.author: bryce-thewell (Bryce K)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello, does anyone else have this issue? Pinging this feature request.

posts.author: AshcroftJewellery (Christian Fox )
posts.cookedHtml: Chrome - Settings - On Startup - Open a Specific Page or Pages - Copy the URL for the “My Work” page into here
